name: Beam AI Platform (Agent OS)
description: Modular Agent Operating System for enterprises. Self-learning AI agents designed for production scale. No-code platform to upload business processes (SOPs) and deploy autonomous agents. Processes 10M+ AI agent tasks for Fortune 500 companies.
capabilities: Role-based agent suites for finance, HR, customer service
notes: Processing 10M+ AI agent tasks. White-glove setup with agents live in 4 weeks. SOPs uploaded directly become agents. Self-learning agents continuously improve from production interactions. Role-based suites for finance, HR, and customer service.
